title: Sarva Mangal Mangalye Mantra
intro: Sarva Mangal Mangalye Mantra – Meaning, Benefits, Chanting Method & Significance
description:
Main Mantra

Sarva Maṅgala Māṅgalye Shive Sarvārtha Sādhike.
Sharanye Tryambake Gauri Nārāyaṇi Namo'stu Te॥

English Meaning

O Most Auspicious One,
the most blessed among all,
O Divine Mother,
who fulfills all righteous goals,
O Giver of refuge,
Three-eyed Goddess Gauri,
O Narayani,
I bow to You
again and again.

faq.q1: What is the Sarva Mangala Mangalye Mantra?
faq.a1: The Sarva Mangala Mangalye Mantra is a sacred prayer dedicated to Goddess Durga, praising her as the source of all auspiciousness, protection, and blessings.
faq.q2: What is the meaning of Sarva Mangala Mangalye?
faq.a2: It means “O Most Auspicious One, the source of all that is auspicious.”
faq.q3: Who is worshipped through this mantra?
faq.a3: This mantra is dedicated to Goddess Narayani, Goddess Durga, and Goddess Gauri.
faq.q4: What are the benefits of chanting this mantra?
faq.a4: Chanting this mantra is believed to bring peace, positivity, protection, and divine blessings.
faq.q5: How many times should this mantra be chanted?
faq.a5: It can be chanted 11, 21, or 108 times according to one’s devotion and practice.
faq.q6: What is the best time to chant this mantra?
faq.a6: Morning prayer time or during meditation is considered ideal for chanting this mantra.
faq.q7: Can anyone chant the Sarva Mangala Mangalye Mantra?
faq.a7: Yes, anyone can chant this mantra with faith and devotion.
faq.a8: This mantra is found in the Durga Saptashati (Devi Mahatmyam) and is a prayer to Goddess Durga.
